resources.string: Welcome to WuWa Companion
Choose the appearance for your first install. You can change the theme later in Settings.
Theme is a user preference and remains independent from the developer-selected build profile.
Finish setup
Save the selected theme and open WuWa Companion.
Updated to version %1$s
The application update was installed successfully. App and database versions continue to update independently.
WuWa Companion was updated from version %1$s to %2$s. Open the release notes for the complete list of changes.
Continue
Release notes
Back
The app checks the repository silently at startup. Database content and APK releases remain independent.
Control appearance and review the fixed profile selected when this APK was built.
Build profile
Images supported
Minimal information
This APK can download and display image packages when the database server publishes them.
This APK ignores image packages and uses information-only layouts.
The developer selected this profile during the GitHub Actions build. It cannot be changed inside the app.
Checks the live database manifest, securely downloads a newer verified package, and installs it without replacing the APK.
Image assets are handled automatically by this build. Installed image package: %1$s
This minimalist build never downloads image assets.
A download button appears only when the matching online build profile has a newer Android version code.
Checking
Downloading
Updated
Version %1$s available
Ready to install
Not published yet
Could not check
Download failed
Package information incomplete
Update app first
Downloading database
Downloading image assets
Downloading application update
Update database
Retry database check
Download version %1$s
Install update
Download, verify, and install the available database package.
Check the repository for a database version newer than the installed one.
Retry the online database manifest check.
Download and verify the newer APK from this build profile’s release channel.
Open Android’s package installer for the verified APK.
No new database update was found.
A newer app version is required before this database package can be installed.
The database update check could not be completed. Check your connection and try again.
The database update could not be downloaded, verified, or installed.
The database was updated, but its optional image package could not be installed. It will be checked again later.
The application update could not be downloaded or verified.
Database version %1$s was installed successfully.
The downloaded APK is no longer available. Download the update again.
Allow this app to install updates, then return to continue.
No application could open this link.
